transactions.summary: Washington Nationals released RHP Julian Fernández.
Texas Rangers signed free agent LHP Benjamin DeTaeye to a minor league contract.
Toronto Blue Jays placed RHP Max Scherzer on the 15-day injured list retroactive to June 14, 2026. Back spasms.
Detroit Tigers activated RHP Casey Mize from the 15-day injured list.
Cleveland Guardians sent LHP Erik Sabrowski on a rehab assignment to Akron RubberDucks.
Detroit Tigers placed 2B Gleyber Torres on the 10-day injured list retroactive to June 16, 2026. Left oblique strain.
Los Angeles Angels activated 2B Vaughn Grissom from the 10-day injured list.
Minnesota Twins sent LHP Kendry Rojas on a rehab assignment to St. Paul Saints.
Los Angeles Angels designated 1B Trey Mancini for assignment.
Toronto Blue Jays recalled RHP Chad Dallas from Buffalo Bisons.
Seattle Mariners recalled RF Connor Joe from Tacoma Rainiers.
Seattle Mariners optioned CF Curtis Washington Jr. to Everett AquaSox.

Torres left the June 15 game after grabbing at his left side (https://www.mlb.com/news/gleyber-torres-exits-tigers-game-in-2nd-inning). He spent time on the injured list earlier this season with a…
Seager will be placed on the 7-day concussion IL, manager Skip Schumaker said on June 15. Seager was out of the lineup for three straight…
Turner suffered a right wrist contusion (https://www.mlb.com/news/trea-turner-right-wrist-injury) after being hit by a pitch during the June 15 game. X-rays came back negative but Turner was…
Keller ( right forearm tendinitis (https://www.mlb.com/news/brad-keller-phillies-injured-list-forearm-tendinitis)) was placed on the 15-day IL on June 16.

Anthony (partially torn ligament in right ring finger) received good news (https://www.mlb.com/news/roman-anthony-garrett-crochet-progressing-in-injury-recovery) on June 16 when a follow-up MRI revealed that he is healing properly.…

DeLauter suffered a right rib cage contusion (https://www.mlb.com/news/chase-delauter-and-angel-martinez-exit-early-in-game-against-tigers) in a collision with the outfield wall on June 13. Imaging revealed bone bruising and a small…
Martínez (non-displaced left foot fracture) was placed on the 10-day IL on June 16, three days after fouling a ball off his foot. He is…
Pasquantino ( right hamate fracture (https://www.mlb.com/news/vinnie-pasquantino-on-injured-list-with-fractured-hamate-bone)) was placed on the 10-day IL on June 14.
Palencia ( right elbow inflammation (https://www.mlb.com/news/daniel-palencia-to-injured-list-with-right-elbow-inflammation)) was placed on the 15-day IL on June 16.
Steele (left elbow surgery) is flying to Chicago and will spend the next three weeks with the club as he progresses through the next phase…
Blanco (torn right UCL) threw a 40-pitch simulated game on June 13 and is expected to begin a rehab assignment shortly.
Scott (right hip impingement) was placed on the 15-day IL (https://www.mlb.com/news/mets-christian-scott-injured-list-2026) on June 15.
Fermin was placed on the 7-day concussion IL (https://www.mlb.com/news/freddy-fermin-placed-on-concussion-injured-list) on June 14 after being hit by a warmup pitch the day before.
